creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to ports.maintainer from comment #5)

My canonical source for NSS: https://curl.se/docs/caextract.html
I need to layer my CA certs from five sources: NSS, QuoVadic, DigiCert, Siemens PKI and Siemens OneAD. The tool is selfwritten in Java which does some X.509 and raw ASN.1 DER processing as well to calculate the subject hash just like OpenSSL does. The fina result in individual files I distribute on RHEL, FreeBSD and HP-UX.
